name: cloudboosta-academy
description: Cloudboosta Academy Student Management System — local dev runner

scripts.install:python: cd microservices/python-app   && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt -q
scripts.install:all: npm run install:python && npm run install:node && npm run install:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "Python,NodeJS,.NET,Frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green,magenta,cyan" "npm run start:python" "npm run start:node" "npm run start:dotnet" "npm run start:frontend"
